attributes.title: [etcd OTel] Raft Consensus
attributes.description: Raft consensus metrics: leader status, proposals committed/applied, pending backlog, failures, heartbeats, and leader changes.

params.markdown:
## [etcd OTel] Raft Consensus

Deep dive into Raft consensus health:
- Leader status and role (leader/follower/learner)
- Proposals committed vs applied
- Pending proposal backlog
- Proposal failures and heartbeat send failures
- Leader election changes

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS with_leader = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader) WHERE etcd_server_has_leader == 1, total = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader)
| EVAL pct = CASE(total > 0, with_leader * 1.0 / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_has_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS with_leader = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader) WHERE etcd_server_has_leader == 1, total = COUNT(etcd_server_has_leader)
| EVAL pct = CASE(total > 0, with_leader * 1.0 / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_is_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS leaders = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_is_leader))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_is_leader IS NOT NULL
| STATS leaders = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_is_leader))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS hb_fail_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS hb_fail_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_slow_apply_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS slow_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_slow_apply_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_slow_apply_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS slow_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_slow_apply_total))

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_server_proposals_committed_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = SUM(DELTA(etcd_server_proposals_committed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL metric = "committed" ) ( WHERE etcd_server_proposals_applied_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = SUM(DELTA(etcd_server_proposals_applied_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL metric = "applied" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel"
| FORK ( WHERE etcd_server_proposals_committed_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = SUM(DELTA(etcd_server_proposals_committed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL metric = "committed" ) ( WHERE etcd_server_proposals_applied_total IS NOT NULL | STATS value = SUM(DELTA(etcd_server_proposals_applied_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend) | EVAL metric = "applied" )

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_pending IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(etcd_server_proposals_pending)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_proposals_failed_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_proposals_failed_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Heartbeat Send Failures Rate by Instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS hb_fail_rate = SUM(RATE(etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = resource.attributes.service.instance.id
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "etcd.otel" AND etcd_server_heartbeat_send_failures_total IS NOT NULL

TS metrics-etcd.otel-*
